description: Baseline: TSC variant on c5.4xlarge (16 vCPU, 32GB), 133 tests
Experiment 1: Cache pulumi-test-language binary build across variants + OTel tracing instrumentation
Experiment 3: Increased parallelism to -parallel=16 (no improvement over default)
Experiment 4: npm_config_prefer_offline=true - instance became unresponsive, likely caused issues with local tarball installs
Experiment 5: node_modules + tsc output caching via hardlinks (SLOWER - cache overhead > savings)
Experiment 6: tmpfs (RAM disk) for test temp directories - 44.8% improvement
